title: Estimate the power budget from activity and leakage
description: Combine dynamic power from switching activity with static leakage to project total power against the budget.
body: Use when planning whether a design fits its thermal and battery budget. Do not estimate from gate count alone, since activity and leakage dominate real power. Actions: gather switching activity from simulation, compute dynamic power from activity and capacitance, and add leakage from the cell mix. Validation signals include a projected power within the budget and a breakdown attributing dynamic versus static contributions. Risk boundary: an underestimate leads to a thermal failure late, so escalate to architectural power cuts when the projection exceeds the budget.
